note: Strict backtest: at each forecast time T, history weather is 24 HRRR f00 analyses for cycles [T-24h, T-1h], future weather is the f01..f24 forecast hours from cycle T-1 (i.e., the most recent cycle issued before T). No future analyses are used. Per-zone demand is the public 5-min fiveminuteestimatedzonalload feed, rolled up to hourly mean.
